userStories.title: Add health check endpoint
userStories.description: Add a /healthz endpoint that returns 200 OK with a JSON body containing service name and uptime.
acceptanceCriteria: Response body includes service name and uptime in seconds

userStories.title: Add structured logging
userStories.description: Replace fmt.Println calls with structured slog logging. Use JSON format in production, text format in development.
acceptanceCriteria: Log level is configurable via LOG_LEVEL env var
JSON output in production, text in dev
